basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Officer-in-Charge Notification 2026 has been released on 21 April 2026 on the official website www.echs.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ECHS Officer-in-Charge Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Minimum 5 years work experience in Health Care Institution or Managerial Positions
qualification.details: Graduate Minimum 5 years work experience in Health Care Institution or Managerial Positions. Additional managerial qualifications are preferred. Experience of more than 10 years is desirable. Computer Qualifications are required. Reserved for Ex-Servicemen (ESM) only.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Officer-in-Charge recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the ECHS Officer-in-Charge post is 19th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Officer-in-Charge position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Officer-in-Charge position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 95,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates and possess a minimum of 5 years of work experience in a Health Care Institution or Managerial Positions. Additional managerial qualifications are also considered.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a particular age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any age-related criteria.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Officer-in-Charge post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is this recruitment open to all candidates?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is exclusively reserved for Ex-Servicemen (ESM) only.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Officer-in-Charge in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Officer-in-Charge position is contractual.
